ham.subject: Upcoming VPN Maintenance - Please Plan Accordingly
ham.body:
Dear Team,

Please be advised that the corporate VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance on Thursday, 18th April from 10:00 PM to 12:00 AM IST. During this window, remote access will be unavailable. To minimise disruption, kripya plan kare and ensure you have offline access to essential documents.

Agar aapko koi question ho, ya assistance ki zaroorat ho, please reach out to IT Support at ithelp@company.com.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Anjali Sharma
IT Operations

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Payroll Verification Required
spam.body:
Hello [Employee Name],

This is HR Manager Rajesh Kumar from Corporate HR. We have detected an anomaly in your payroll account for the last month. To avoid any delay in your salary disbursement, kripya verify your bank details by clicking the link below and complete the confirmation within 24 hours.

<URL>

If you do not comply, your salary will be temporarily suspended until the issue is resolved. Agar aapne already updated details, please ignore this notice.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Regards,
Rajesh Kumar
HR Manager
Corporate HR
